features: Thin wire design with low profile gold plated connectors
Ideal for wall mounted TVs and monitors where space is limited
HDMI v2.0 4K & HDCP 2.2 compliant (apart from 5m/10m versions)
description: From the manufacturer AV:Link | Thin-Wire HDMI Cable, High Speed Pro Gold plated HD ready, 3D compatible. Ideal for games consoles, CD, DVD, Blueray, Satellite and cable boxes | 5.0 Metre Thin-Wire HDMI cable, which has an ultra slim, flexible cable making routing to the back of your TV or monitor a breeze. The low profile connectors are around 40% shorter than those of conventional HDMI cables, making them ideal for wall mounted units where space behind the TV is an issue. 5 & 10 metre variations ARE NOT 4k compatible. PRODUCT FEATURES: Thin wire design with low profile gold plated connectors Ideal for wall mounted TVs and monitors where space is limited HDMI v2.0 4K & HDCP 2.2 compliant (apart from 5m/10m versions) Ethernet, audio return and 3D compatible SPECIFICATION: Cable : Diameter 6mmØ Length 5.0m Data transfer rate 18Gbps 4K Compatible : NO
